name: Semisweet Chocolate Ganache
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Semisweet chocolate, broken into 1/2 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the heavy cream, butter, and sugar in a 2 1/2 quart saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. When hot, stir to dissolve the sugar.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Place the chocolate in a stainless steel bowl.
5. Pour the boiling cream over the chocolate and allow to stand for 5 minutes.
6. Stir until smooth.
7. Allow to cool to room temperature.
